metadata.description: Forensic tokenomics: audit token designs for death-spiral and economic-attack risk, and design resilient crypto economies.

plugins.name: tokenomics-death-spiral-audit
plugins.description: Audit any token design for death-spiral (reflexive collapse) and economic-attack risk, and design resilient tokenomics. 15 anti-patterns from 50+ collapse post-mortems, a measurable scorecard + cost-of-corruption security panel, a survivor control group, out-of-sample validation, 16 positive design patterns, 8 archetype playbooks, and a bundled stdlib-only stress-runner. Research/design reference, not investment advice.
